title: Leisure Suit Larry 1 - In the Land of the Lounge Lizards

notes: The game runs fine. If the game area is too small use ctrl+alt+plus to scale the game up. The game runs through scummvm so you can use the hotkeys described here: https://wiki.scummvm.org/index.php/User_Manual/Playing_a_game_with_ScummVM
title: Leisure Suit Larry 1 - In the Land of the Lounge Lizards

notes: 1) Properties -> Betas and select VGA version (much better graphics) 2) use alt+enter to leave fulscreen and ctrl+alt+plus to make window bigger, but in fullscreen you can't actually go fullscreen :/
title: Leisure Suit Larry 1 - In the Land of the Lounge Lizards

notes: Use either Boxtron 0.5.1 to play through DOSBox: https://github.com/dreamer/boxtron or Roberta 0.1.0 to play through ScummVM: https://github.com/dreamer/roberta - both work great. It's recommended to switch to "vgaversion" branch.
title: Leisure Suit Larry 1 - In the Land of the Lounge Lizards
